prompt_en: A sealed relay ending where the mast keeps broadcasting one controlled signal through sea fog, evidence lockers close, and a fragile line survives by narrowing the truth. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. radio mast beacon, sealed evidence lockers, controlled signal, sea fog, narrow safe corridor. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 중계소는 살아남지만 진실 일부를 봉인하는 엔딩. 차가운 안개와 봉인된 기록이 핵심이다.
camera_notes: Frame the mast as alive but morally compromised, with the lockers closing in the foreground.
audio_notes: Mast hum, clipped relay tone, muted metal latches, thin choir pad.
stitch_prompt: A sealed relay ending where the mast keeps broadcasting one controlled signal through sea fog, evidence lockers close, and a fragile line survives by narrowing the truth. Match style pack P3.ending.p3_end_sealed_relay.
